entities.signature: findIndex :: Ord a => a -> Set a -> Int

entities.signature: lookupIndex :: Ord a => a -> Set a -> Maybe Int

entities.signature: deleteAt :: Int -> Set a -> Set a

entities.signature: take :: Int -> Set a -> Set a

entities.signature: drop :: Int -> Set a -> Set a

entities.name: splitAt
entities.signature: splitAt :: Int -> Set a -> (Set a, Set a)

entities.name: SetBuilder
entities.signature: data SetBuilder a = BAsc !(Stack a) | BSet !(Set a)

entities.name: minView
entities.signature: minView :: Set a -> Maybe (a, Set a)

entities.name: maxView
entities.signature: maxView :: Set a -> Maybe (a, Set a)

entities.name: cartesianProduct
entities.signature: cartesianProduct :: Set a -> Set b -> Set (a, b)

entities.name: MergeSet
entities.signature: newtype MergeSet a = MergeSet { getMergeSet :: Set a }

entities.name: WhenMissing
entities.signature: data WhenMissing f a = WhenMissing { missingSubtree :: Set a -> f (Set a) , missingElem :: a -> f Bool }

entities.name: WhenMatched
entities.signature: newtype WhenMatched f a = WhenMatched { matchedElem :: a -> f Bool }

entities.name: merge
entities.signature: merge :: Ord a => SimpleWhenMissing a -> SimpleWhenMissing a -> SimpleWhenMatched a -> Set a -> Set a -> Set a

entities.name: mergeA
entities.signature: mergeA :: (Applicative f, Ord a) => WhenMissing f a -> WhenMissing f a -> WhenMatched f a -> Set a -> Set a -> f (Set a)

entities.signature: showTreeWith :: Show a => Bool -> Bool -> Set a -> String

entities.signature: valid :: Ord a => Set a -> Bool

entities.name: init
entities.signature: @callback init(init_arg :: term) :: {:ok, state} | {:ok, state, timeout | :hibernate | {:continue, continue_arg :: term}} | :ignore | {:stop, reason :: term} when state: term

entities.name: handle_call
entities.signature: @callback handle_call(request :: term, from, state :: term) :: {:reply, reply, new_state} | {:reply, reply, new_state, timeout | :hibernate | {:continue, continue_arg :: term}} | {:noreply, new_state} | {:noreply, new_state, timeout | :hibernate | {:continue, continue_arg :: term}} | {:stop, reason, reply, new_state} | {:stop, reason, new_state} when reply: term, new_state: term, reason: term

entities.name: handle_cast
entities.signature: @callback handle_cast(request :: term, state :: term) :: {:noreply, new_state} | {:noreply, new_state, timeout | :hibernate | {:continue, continue_arg :: term}} | {:stop, reason :: term, new_state} when new_state: term

entities.name: handle_info
entities.signature: @callback handle_info(msg :: :timeout | term, state :: term) :: {:noreply, new_state} | {:noreply, new_state, timeout | :hibernate | {:continue, continue_arg :: term}} | {:stop, reason :: term, new_state} when new_state: term

entities.name: handle_continue
entities.signature: @callback handle_continue(continue_arg, state :: term) :: {:noreply, new_state} | {:noreply, new_state, timeout | :hibernate | {:continue, continue_arg}} | {:stop, reason :: term, new_state} when new_state: term, continue_arg: term

entities.name: terminate
entities.signature: @callback terminate(reason, state :: term) :: term when reason: :normal | :shutdown | {:shutdown, term} | term

entities.name: code_change
entities.signature: @callback code_change(old_vsn, state :: term, extra :: term) :: {:ok, new_state :: term} | {:error, reason :: term} when old_vsn: term | {:down, term}

entities.name: format_status
entities.signature: @callback format_status(reason, pdict_and_state :: list) :: term when reason: :normal | :terminate

entities.signature: @type name :: nil | atom | {:global, term} | {:via, module, term}

entities.signature: def start_link(module, init_arg, options \\ []) when is_atom(module) and is_list(options)

entities.name: start
entities.signature: def start(module, init_arg, options \\ []) when is_atom(module) and is_list(options)

entities.signature: def call(server, request, timeout \\ 5000) when (is_integer(timeout) and timeout >= 0) or timeout == :infinity

entities.name: grandparent
entities.signature: grandparent(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), parent(Y, Z).

entities.name: grandmother
entities.signature: grandmother(X, Z) :- mother(X, Y), parent(Y, Z).

entities.name: grandfather

entities.name: sibling
entities.signature: sibling(X, Y) :- parent(Z, X), parent(Z, Y), X \= Y.
